Nini (2025)

You will see dragons if you remember to look up

About Nini

Nini is a saleswoman who loves doodling fish. She was drawing so much at work that she began seeing an ocean unveiling in her office. Nini's story is about those who make difficult choices they may or may not regret.

Project Nini is currently in pre-production. It will be produced as a 12-minute animated short.

Rebecca Huang

Animation director and story artist
